auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Ragie API key used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create it by following the official guide at https://docs.ragie.ai/docs/step-1-create-an-api-key.

actions.name: create_document_from_url
actions.description: Create a Ragie document from a public URL when the source file is already hosted externally.

url.description: The public URL of the source document.

anyOf.description: A loose JSON object accepted by Ragie.

mode.description: The optional processing mode for ingestion.

metadata.description: A metadata object containing Ragie-compatible primitive values.

partition.description: The partition to place the document in.

externalId.description: The external identifier of the document.

id.description: The unique identifier of the document.

status.description: The current processing status of the document.

metadata.description: A metadata object containing Ragie-compatible primitive values.

partition.description: The partition that scopes the document.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was created.

updatedAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was last updated.

pageCount.description: The number of pages in the document.

externalId.description: The external identifier of the document.

actions.name: create_document_raw
actions.description: Create a Ragie document from raw text or JSON data when the content already exists in memory and does not need file upload.

anyOf.description: The raw text content to ingest.
A loose JSON object accepted by Ragie.

data.description: The raw data to ingest into Ragie.

metadata.description: A metadata object containing Ragie-compatible primitive values.

partition.description: The partition to place the document in.

externalId.description: The external identifier of the document.

id.description: The unique identifier of the document.

status.description: The current processing status of the document.

metadata.description: A metadata object containing Ragie-compatible primitive values.

partition.description: The partition that scopes the document.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was created.

updatedAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was last updated.

pageCount.description: The number of pages in the document.

externalId.description: The external identifier of the document.

actions.name: create_oauth_redirect_url
actions.description: Create the Ragie embedded OAuth redirect URL for a connection source type such as Google Drive or Notion.

redirectUri.description: The redirect URI that Ragie should return the user to.

sourceType.description: The Ragie connection source type to authorize.

theme.description: The theme for Ragie's OAuth UI.

config.description: A loose JSON object accepted by Ragie.

metadata.description: A metadata object containing Ragie-compatible primitive values.

partition.description: The partition to scope the connection to.

pageLimit.description: The maximum number of pages Ragie may sync.

anyOf.description: A loose JSON object accepted by Ragie.

mode.description: The optional processing mode for ingestion.

authenticatorId.description: The white-label authenticator identifier to use.

url.description: The OAuth redirect URL returned by Ragie.

actions.name: create_partition
actions.description: Create a Ragie partition to isolate documents, metadata schemas, and resource limits by workspace or tenant.

contextAware.description: Whether the partition should generate context-aware descriptions.

metadataSchema.description: A loose JSON object accepted by Ragie.

mediaHostedLimitMax.description: The maximum hosted media limit in megabytes.

mediaStreamedLimitMax.description: The maximum streamed media limit in megabytes.

audioProcessedLimitMax.description: The maximum audio processing limit in minutes.

videoProcessedLimitMax.description: The maximum video processing limit in minutes.

mediaHostedLimitMonthly.description: The monthly hosted media limit in megabytes.

mediaStreamedLimitMonthly.description: The monthly streamed media limit in megabytes.

audioProcessedLimitMonthly.description: The monthly audio processing limit in minutes.

videoProcessedLimitMonthly.description: The monthly video processing limit in minutes.

actions.name: delete_document
actions.description: Delete a Ragie document, optionally in asynchronous mode.

async.description: Whether Ragie should delete the document asynchronously.

partition.description: The partition to scope the request to.

status.description: The deletion status returned by Ragie.

actions.name: delete_partition
actions.description: Delete a Ragie partition, optionally in asynchronous mode.

asyncDeletion.description: Whether Ragie should delete the partition asynchronously.

message.description: The deletion result message returned by Ragie.

actions.name: get_document
actions.description: Get a single Ragie document by ID to inspect status, metadata, errors, and counts.

partition.description: The partition to scope the request to.

id.description: The unique identifier of the document.

status.description: The current processing status of the document.

metadata.description: A metadata object containing Ragie-compatible primitive values.

partition.description: The partition that scopes the document.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was created.

updatedAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was last updated.

pageCount.description: The number of pages in the document.

externalId.description: The external identifier of the document.

actions.name: get_document_chunks
actions.description: List the chunks of a Ragie document with cursor pagination and optional start/end index filtering.

cursor.description: The pagination cursor returned by a previous chunk list call.

pageSize.description: The number of chunks to return per page.

partition.description: The partition to scope the request to.

id.description: The unique identifier of the chunk.

links.description: A loose JSON object accepted by Ragie.

metadata.description: A loose JSON object accepted by Ragie.

anyOf.description: The cursor for the next page of results.

totalCount.description: The total number of records in the result set.

actions.name: get_document_content
actions.description: Get Ragie document content in the requested media type, with optional byte range and download behavior.

range.description: The HTTP byte range to request from Ragie.

download.description: Whether Ragie should return content as a download.

partition.description: The partition to scope the request to.

mediaType.description: The media type to request from Ragie.

id.description: The unique identifier of the document.

status.description: The current processing status of the document.

metadata.description: A metadata object containing Ragie-compatible primitive values.

partition.description: The partition that scopes the document.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was created.

updatedAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was last updated.

pageCount.description: The number of pages in the document.

externalId.description: The external identifier of the document.

content.description: The document content in the requested media type.

actions.name: get_document_summary
actions.description: Get the Ragie-generated summary for a specific document.

partition.description: The partition to scope the request to.

actions.name: get_partition
actions.description: Get a specific Ragie partition together with its limits and usage stats.

actions.name: list_connection_source_types
actions.description: List the embedded connector source types that Ragie can authorize and sync through its connections API.

docsUrl.description: The documentation URL for the connector.

actions.name: list_connections
actions.description: List Ragie connections with metadata filtering, pagination, and optional partition scoping.

cursor.description: The pagination cursor returned by a previous list call.

filter.description: The filter expression used to narrow returned connections.

pageSize.description: The number of connections to return per page.

partition.description: The partition to scope the request to.

source.description: A loose JSON object accepted by Ragie.

metadata.description: A loose JSON object accepted by Ragie.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the connection was created.

updatedAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the connection was last updated.

pageLimit.description: The maximum page limit configured on the connection.

disabledBySystem.description: Whether the connection was disabled by the system.

anyOf.description: The reason why the system disabled the connection.
The cursor for the next page of results.

totalCount.description: The total number of records in the result set.

actions.name: list_documents
actions.description: List Ragie documents with filter, cursor pagination, and optional partition scoping to inspect ingestion progress.

cursor.description: The pagination cursor returned by a previous list call.

filter.description: The filter expression used to narrow returned documents.

pageSize.description: The number of documents to return per page.

partition.description: The partition to scope the request to.

id.description: The unique identifier of the document.

status.description: The current processing status of the document.

metadata.description: A metadata object containing Ragie-compatible primitive values.

partition.description: The partition that scopes the document.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was created.

updatedAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the document was last updated.

pageCount.description: The number of pages in the document.

externalId.description: The external identifier of the document.

anyOf.description: The cursor for the next page of results.

totalCount.description: The total number of records in the result set.

actions.name: list_partitions
actions.description: List available Ragie partitions and their current limits with cursor pagination.

cursor.description: The pagination cursor returned by a previous list call.

pageSize.description: The number of partitions to return per page.

anyOf.description: The cursor for the next page of results.

totalCount.description: The total number of records in the result set.

actions.name: patch_document_metadata
actions.description: Patch Ragie document metadata in place without replacing the entire metadata object.

metadata.description: The metadata fields to upsert or remove with null values.

partition.description: The partition to scope the request to.

async.description: Whether Ragie should run the metadata patch asynchronously.

status.description: The accepted status when Ragie runs the patch asynchronously.

metadata.description: A metadata object containing Ragie-compatible primitive values.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for this action.

actions.name: retrieve
actions.description: Retrieve the most relevant Ragie document chunks for a query, with optional metadata filters, reranking, and partition scoping.

query.description: The search query used for retrieval.

topK.description: The maximum number of chunks to return.

filter.description: A loose JSON object accepted by Ragie.

rerank.description: Whether Ragie should rerank chunks for semantic relevance.

partition.description: The partition to scope retrieval to.

recencyBias.description: Whether to favor newer documents during retrieval.

maxChunksPerDocument.description: The maximum number of chunks to return per document.

id.description: The unique identifier of the chunk.

links.description: A loose JSON object accepted by Ragie.

metadata.description: A loose JSON object accepted by Ragie.

documentId.description: The identifier of the source document.

documentName.description: The name of the source document.

documentMetadata.description: A metadata object containing Ragie-compatible primitive values.

items.description: A scored retrieval chunk returned by Ragie.

actions.name: set_partition_limits
actions.description: Update the page, media, audio, and video limits on an existing Ragie partition.

mediaHostedLimitMax.description: The maximum hosted media limit in megabytes.

mediaStreamedLimitMax.description: The maximum streamed media limit in megabytes.

audioProcessedLimitMax.description: The maximum audio processing limit in minutes.

videoProcessedLimitMax.description: The maximum video processing limit in minutes.

mediaHostedLimitMonthly.description: The monthly hosted media limit in megabytes.

mediaStreamedLimitMonthly.description: The monthly streamed media limit in megabytes.

audioProcessedLimitMonthly.description: The monthly audio processing limit in minutes.

videoProcessedLimitMonthly.description: The monthly video processing limit in minutes.

actions.name: update_partition
actions.description: Update a Ragie partition's description, metadata schema, and context-aware setting without recreating it.

contextAware.description: Whether the partition should be context-aware after the update.

metadataSchema.description: A loose JSON object accepted by Ragie.
